description_long: This object consists of three pumpkins of varying sizes grouped together, each displaying a classic round shape with deep vertical ridges and a rich orange color. The pumpkins have realistic, slightly glossy surfaces with subtle shading and textural details that mimic natural pumpkin skin. Each pumpkin is topped with a short, greenish-brown stem that is slightly curved and textured. The largest pumpkin is positioned at the back, with the medium and small pumpkins arranged in front and to the side, creating a visually balanced cluster. There are no visible carvings, facial features, or decorative accessories on any of the pumpkins. The overall appearance is natural and unadorned, suitable for autumn or Halloween-themed urban settings.
description: A cluster of three natural, uncarved orange pumpkins with green stems, featuring realistic surface texture and shading. The pumpkins vary in size and are grouped together in a visually balanced arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three pumpkins, with the smallest in the foreground and the largest in the back, clearly displaying their stems and surface texture.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the largest pumpkin in the foreground, with the medium and small pumpkins partially visible behind it.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the largest and medium pumpkins, with the smallest pumpkin mostly obscured from sight.
description_view_3: Rear-side view showing the backs of the largest and medium pumpkins, with the smallest pumpkin not visible.
